records.m_Talk_ENG: that this machine, that you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You needed me for something, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You needed me for something, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You needed me for something, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Just say the word! With the Helios System, I can fly anywhere
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Just say the word! With the Helios System, I can fly anywhere
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Just say the word! With the Helios System, I can fly anywhere
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? A lifetime contract...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? A lifetime contract...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? A lifetime contract...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, do you know Dr. Chernov?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, do you know Dr. Chernov?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, do you know Dr. Chernov?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Director Ember may have been the one who created my AI core...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Director Ember may have been the one who created my AI core...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Director Ember may have been the one who created my AI core...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it was Dr. Chernov who taught me that I possess a soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it was Dr. Chernov who taught me that I possess a soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it was Dr. Chernov who taught me that I possess a soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of him, I can stand here today, guarding people by your side!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of him, I can stand here today, guarding people by your side!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of him, I can stand here today, guarding people by your side!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even now, after all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even now, after all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even now, after all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
His will
8g No, the will of Future-at-War, to protect mankind, has been carried forward...
records.m_Talk_DEU:
His will
8g No, the will of Future-at-War, to protect mankind, has been carried forward...
records.m_Talk_FRA:
His will
8g No, the will of Future-at-War, to protect mankind, has been carried forward...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And at last, the Hyperion Plan has been completed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And at last, the Hyperion Plan has been completed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And at last, the Hyperion Plan has been completed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I swear upon my adamant alloy that every moment fighting at your side has been worth it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I swear upon my adamant alloy that every moment fighting at your side has been worth it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I swear upon my adamant alloy that every moment fighting at your side has been worth it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every act to protect people and to defend this world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every act to protect people and to defend this world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every act to protect people and to defend this world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It all affirms the very reason I was brought into existence!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It all affirms the very reason I was brought into existence!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It all affirms the very reason I was brought into existence!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you were fighting to protect the world, didn't you, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you were fighting to protect the world, didn't you, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you were fighting to protect the world, didn't you, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I too was created to protect mankind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I too was created to protect mankind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I too was created to protect mankind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And ever since my AI gained self-awareness, I have never once doubted that purpose!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And ever since my AI gained self-awareness, I have never once doubted that purpose!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And ever since my AI gained self-awareness, I have never once doubted that purpose!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no doubt your goal will be achieved!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no doubt your goal will be achieved!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no doubt your goal will be achieved!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... sealing a contract with flimsy paper and ink that aren't even waterproof feels terribly inefficient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... sealing a contract with flimsy paper and ink that aren't even waterproof feels terribly inefficient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... sealing a contract with flimsy paper and ink that aren't even waterproof feels terribly inefficient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't matter, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't matter, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't matter, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I guess you're right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I guess you're right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I guess you're right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What truly matters is the unbreakable trust between you and me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What truly matters is the unbreakable trust between you and me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What truly matters is the unbreakable trust between you and me!
